contract's owner."}},"isFeelessFor(address,uint256,address)":{"details":"The static admin-set mappings are caller-agnostic and always apply. The hook (if set) receives `caller` (typically the terminal's `_msgSender()`) and may use it to narrow its grant — e.g. grant an ecosystem router feeless cash-outs only when the router itself is the caller, not when it appears as a split recipient of someone else's payout. Hook is invoked via try/catch — a reverting hook is treated as `false`.","params":{"addr":"The address to check.","caller":"The outer caller (typically the terminal's `_msgSender()`). Pass `address(0)` for lookups without caller context.","projectId":"The ID of the project to check."},"returns":{"_0":"A flag indicating whether the address is feeless."}},"owner()":{"details":"Returns the address of the current owner."},"renounceOwnership()":{"details":"Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner."},"setFeelessAddress(address,bool)":{"details":"Equivalent to `setFeelessAddressFor(0, addr, flag)`.Can only be called by this contract's owner (typically the protocol multisig).","params":{"addr":"The address to set as feeless or not feeless.","flag":"Whether the address should be feeless (`true`) or not feeless (`false`)."}},"setFeelessAddressFor(uint256,address,bool)":{"details":"Can only be called by this contract's owner (typically the protocol multisig).Use `projectId = 0` to set the global (all-project) feeless status.","params":{"addr":"The address to set as feeless or not feeless for the project.","flag":"Whether the address should be feeless for the project (`true`) or not (`false`).","projectId":"The ID of the project. 0 means all projects."}},"setFeelessHook(address)":{"details":"Can only be called by this contract's owner (typically the protocol multisig).If `hook` is non-zero, it must report ERC-165 support for `IJBFeelessHook` or this call reverts.","params":{"hook":"The new hook. Pass `address(0)` to disable hook consultation."}},"supportsInterface(bytes4)":{"details":"See {IERC165-supportsInterface}.","params":{"interfaceId":"The ID of the interface to check for adherence to."},"returns":{"_0":"A flag indicating if the provided interface ID is supported."}},"transferOwnership(address)":{"details":"Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner."}},"version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"feelessHook()":{"notice":"Optional hook consulted (in addition to the static mappings) when computing feeless status."},"isFeelessFor(address,uint256,address)":{"notice":"Returns whether the specified address is feeless for a specific project, providing the outer caller of the fee-bearing operation so hooks can scope grants by who initiated the action."},"setFeelessAddress(address,bool)":{"notice":"Add or remove an address from the global (all-project) fee-exempt list."},"setFeelessAddressFor(uint256,address,bool)":{"notice":"Add or remove an address from a project's fee-exempt list."},"setFeelessHook(address)":{"notice":"Sets (or clears) the feeless hook
